description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, armored body with a predominantly black and gold color scheme. Its torso is broad and angular, with geometric gold accents and a star motif on each forearm. The arms and legs are thick and cylindrical, ending in blocky, mechanical hands and feet, suggesting strength and stability. The shoulders are large, spherical, and gold, connected to the arms by sturdy joints. The back of the robot displays a prominent gold panel, while the front is marked by angular plating and recessed gold details. The overall design is utilitarian and imposing, suitable for urban environments where durability and presence are important.
description: A sturdy, black and gold humanoid robot with large spherical shoulders, blocky limbs, and star motifs on its forearms, designed for strength and urban presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad chest, angular plating, large gold shoulders, and star motifs on the forearms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the spherical gold shoulder, cylindrical arm, and the thickness of the limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a prominent gold panel on the back and the robust structure of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other, with emphasis on the gold shoulder and cylindrical arm.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms hanging down at the sides, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, torso facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated black and gold armored panels with decorative star motifs.
attribute_facial_features: No visible facial features; the head area is integrated into the torso with no discernible eyes, mouth, or display.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible cylindrical joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, suggesting hinge or rotary articulation; limbs appear rigid and robust.
